caption: A close-up view captures a vehicle's dashboard instrument cluster. The display includes a digital screen and several analog gauges. Legible text on the dashboard reads "UNLEADED FUEL ONLY" and "D SDN ALARM". The digital screen displays numeric values, including a large "0" at the bottom, while analog needles point to various markings on dials scaled up to 280. A white object partially obscures the lower-left side of the view, and a portion of a control handle is visible at the bottom center. Across the sequence of frames, the view remains steady with minimal movement, showing the instrument panel in a static state. There are no people present in the scene. The lighting is consistent, illuminating the grey and black surfaces of the dashboard and the orange-yellow tones of the gauges and digital display.
